summary: Recording marred by frequent out‑of‑sync problems, with no performance details provided
review: The matrix source suffers from persistent synchronization issues that make the listening experience difficult. Reviewers gave no feedback on the musical performance, so the show’s quality cannot be assessed.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review, rating of 0 stars and a strong complaint about sync problems; no positive comments to offset the negative.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Two sources frequently fall out of sync, causing audible timing errors throughout the set.
